workspaceTrust.description: LSParrot can read workspace settings and execute PHP processes for the language server, analyzers, tests, and debug handoff. In Restricted Mode these execution paths stay disabled.
configuration.title: LSParrot
configuration.phpstan.title: PHPStan
configuration.psalm.title: Psalm
configuration.psalmLanguageServer.title: Psalm Language Server
configuration.debug.title: Debug
configuration.phpPath.description: PHP executable used to launch the LSP server. Command names resolved from PATH are allowed; absolute paths must be under a trusted system, PATH, or trusted workspace directory.
configuration.additionalAnalyzer.descrip: Additional analyzer backends passed to the LSP server. LSParrot Engine is always enabled; leave this empty to run LSParrot Engine only.
configuration.phpstanLevel.description: PHPStan analysis level used when no phpstan.neon exists in the Composer project. Defaults to 6 as an existing-project-friendly level. Configure detailed PHPStan options in phpstan.neon. Ignored when phpstan.neon, phpstan.neon.dist, phpstan.dist.neon, .phpstan.neon, or .phpstan.neon.dist exists.
configuration.psalmLevel.description: Psalm error level used when no psalm.xml exists in the Composer project. Defaults to 6 as an existing-project-friendly fallback. Configure detailed Psalm options in psalm.xml. Ignored when psalm.xml or psalm.xml.dist exists.
configuration.extensionPath.description: Debug-only path or name for the ext-lsparrot binary, passed as -dextension=... Absolute paths must be under a trusted system, PATH, or trusted workspace directory. Ignored when the selected PHP binary already loads ext-lsparrot.
configuration.phpArgs.description: Additional arguments passed to PHP before the LSP bootstrap code. Runtime path values such as extension and auto_prepend_file must reference trusted locations.
configuration.phpMemoryLimit.description: memory_limit passed to the PHP processes used by the LSP server and external analyzers. Defaults to -1. Use an empty string to leave PHP defaults untouched.
configuration.enableJit.description: Enable OPcache JIT for the PHP CLI processes when OPcache is available.
configuration.jitBufferSize.description: opcache.jit_buffer_size passed when JIT is enabled. Defaults to 32M.
configuration.jitMode.description: opcache.jit mode passed when JIT is enabled.
configuration.symbolIndexSize.descriptio: Memory capacity reserved for the lsparrot project symbol index.
configuration.workerCount.description: Parallel worker count passed to PHPStan/Psalm when supported. 0 lets the server choose automatically.
configuration.analyzerDiagnosticsTimeout: Maximum seconds to wait for PHPStan/Psalm diagnostics before publishing lsparrot diagnostics only.
configuration.psalm.transport.descriptio: Psalm backend transport. auto uses Psalm Language Server when available and falls back to CLI.
configuration.psalm.onChange.description: Forward document change events to Psalm Language Server.
configuration.psalm.onChangeDebounceMs.d: Debounce delay passed to Psalm Language Server for on-change analysis.
configuration.psalm.maxResponseWaitMs.de: Maximum milliseconds LSParrot waits for a Psalm Language Server response before returning lsparrot results.
configuration.psalm.enableAutocomplete.d: Enable Psalm Language Server autocomplete integration.
configuration.psalm.enableHover.descript: Enable Psalm Language Server hover integration.
configuration.psalm.enableDefinition.des: Enable Psalm Language Server definition integration.
Enable Psalm Language Server signature help integration.
configuration.psalm.liveDeadCodeDiagnost: Run Psalm dead-code style diagnostics during live analysis.
configuration.psalm.inMemory.description: Enable Psalm Language Server in-memory mode.
configuration.autoDetectWorkspaceExtensi: Automatically load ext/modules/lsparrot.so or an equivalent workspace build when present.
